history.content:
<thought>
Estou orientado para cima. A célula à minha frente é uma lava, então não posso avançar com segurança. Vou girar no sentido horário para procurar uma direção livre.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
A frente de mim há um muro (#), então não posso avançar. O caminho livre mais promissor é virar para tentar sair dessa coluna bloqueada, e a célula à esquerda parece livre.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a lava cell, so I must not move forward. The safe open path is to my right, so I will rotate clockwise to face it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
A célula à frente de mim é uma parede, então não posso avançar. O lado esquerdo parece livre, enquanto à direita também há parede. Vou girar no sentido anti-horário para tentar me orientar para uma direção com passagem segura.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I'm facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a lava cell, so moving forward is unsafe. The right side from my current orientation is open floor, so I will rotate clockwise to reorient toward a safer path.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is the goal-free floor `.` and is safe. Moving forward is the best choice to continue exploring toward the unknown area while avoiding the lava on the left.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The left side is also blocked by lava nearby, while the right side appears to be open floor. I will rotate clockwise to look for a safe path around the obstacles.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
There is no goal visible yet. The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, while turning would not help as much as advancing into the open area. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell, so the simplest progress is to move forward. There is no visible goal or lava nearby in this view.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
A frente imediata está livre (`.`), então posso avançar com segurança. Não há lava visível e a parede está mais à direita, então seguir em frente parece a melhor opção para explorar na direção atual.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a free floor cell, while the right side is blocked by a wall. Since moving forward is safe and keeps me exploring the open area, I will advance.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. The open cell to my right is safe, so I will rotate clockwise to face it.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me contains lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The safe option is to rotate and look for an alternate path toward the open floor cells on the right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a lava cell, so I cannot go forward safely. I should rotate to look for a safe path around the lava barrier.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The safest open cells nearby are to my left or right after turning, and I need to explore toward the unknown area and avoid lava. I will turn clockwise to face a free direction.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is free, so I can safely move forward. There is no visible goal yet, so advancing is the best choice to explore and keep moving through open space.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
A célula à frente de mim está livre e não há lava visível imediatamente no caminho. Como não vejo o objetivo ainda, a melhor opção é avançar para explorar e revelar mais do mapa.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
In front of me there is a free floor cell, while the cells to the left are also open but the path ahead is clear and safe. I will move forward to explore toward the unknown area.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
In the current view, the cell directly in front of me is a free floor cell, while the wall is further to the right. Since I have no goal visible yet, moving forward is safe and helps explore the map.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
There is no goal visible yet. In front of me there is a free cell `.`, so moving forward is safe and will help explore the map. Turning is unnecessary right now.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a free floor cell, so I can advance safely. Moving forward is the best next step to explore toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is empty floor, so moving forward is safe and explores toward the unknown area.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
A minha frente há uma célula livre `.`, então posso avançar com segurança. Não há objetivo visível ainda, mas mover para frente explora o caminho aberto.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
Na minha frente há uma célula livre `.`, então posso avançar com segurança. Não há objetivo visível ainda, mas seguir em frente explora o mapa sem risco imediato.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
A célula à frente de mim está livre (`.`), então posso avançar com segurança. Vou seguir em frente para explorar o caminho aberto.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
